seoTitle: Anglesea vs Annuello — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Anglesea and Annuello. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Anglesea and Annuello.
heading: Anglesea vs Annuello — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Anglesea, Victoria and Annuello, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Annuello has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Anglesea (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Anglesea or Annuello safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Anglesea has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Annuello scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Anglesea scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Annuello scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Anglesea or Annuello?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Annuello has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
